# Aura Teaching Context

## Curriculum Summary
- Subject: Mathematics
- Grade level: 8
- Topics: linear equations smoke pipeline 20260505 fixed
- Learning goals: Understand what a linear equation is; Solve one-step linear equations

## Core Concept List
- Linear relationship equation
- Line equation components
- Line steepness meaning
- Vertical intercept meaning
- linear relationship
- Slope is rate of change
- Vertical intercept of a graph
- Calculating line slope
- Linear equation form
- Equation balance metaphor
- Balancing equations by adding or subtracting
- Solving linear equations
- System of linear equations
- Distance speed time formula
- Intersection Point Solving
- Solving linear equations
- Meeting point distance equation
- Solving linear equations for time
- Hanger balance and tilt
- Equation definition

## Common Misconceptions
- None recorded.

## Useful Analogies
- Equation balance metaphor: An equation represents a balanced hanger where expressions on either side have equal value.

## Prerequisites
Use graph relations marked `requires` and nearby concept cards.

## Accessibility Notes
- Disability profile: adhd, dyslexia
- Pace: slow
- Preferred modality: mixed
- Keep text short, use concrete examples, and avoid visible scoring language.
